violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Dry cloths were being used to wipe the cutting board on the prep cooler. These need to be stored in sanitizer.--In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. Rice scoops and bowls by the rice cookers were being stored in a container of water that was 73 degrees.

Thawing potentially hazardous food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not thawed in an approved manner. A bag of raw chicken was thawing in the prep sink. Chicken was sitting in bottom of sink with no running water.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Filters and hood system need to be cleaned.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Ceiling tile in the kitchen were missing, or falling.
